creator: ports@nicandneal.net
text:
Created attachment 219370
Diffs to upgrade port.

For some reason the distribution file of nim 1.4 has changed on the nim web site without a change in version.

Two things have been added to the distribution and are no longer distributed from their own github repository:
- fusion
- nimble

The latter no longer needs it's own port, so devel/nimble should be removed.
